text_preview:
HYCOM Model Development, Validation, and
Documentation
Alan J. Wallcraft
Naval Research Laboratory
8th Hybrid Coordinate Ocean Model Workshop
August 21, 2003
HYCOM 2.1.03 (I)
/AF First public release of HYCOM 2.1
Æ September, 2002
/AF Maintain all features of HYCOM 2.0
Æ Requires Fortran 90
Æ Can use HYCOM for pure iso-pycnal cases
Æ KPP or Kraus-Turner mixed-layer
Æ Energy-Loan (passive) ice model
Æ High frequency atmospheric forcing
Æ New I/O scheme (.a and .b ﬁles)
Æ Scalability via OpenMP or MPI or both
/A3 Bit-for-bit multi-cpu reproducibility
HYCOM 2.1.03 (II)
/AF Orthogonal curvilinear grids
/AF Fully global domains
Æ Near-global Mercator already in HYCOM 2.0
Æ Pan-Am grid with closed Bering Strait
/A3 Open Bering Strait requires a special halo
exchange (still not available)
/AF Multiple tracers
Æ Passive
Æ Simple biology (NPZ or NPZD)
/A3 Most of infrastructure in place
/A3 More work needed on biology and boundary
conditions
/AF Rivers as bogused surface precipitation
Æ Annual or monthly climatology
HYCOM 2.1.03 (III)
/AF Off-line one-way nesting
Æ Similar to MICOM
/A3 Exact b.c. for depth averaged component
/A3 Relaxation for 3-D T/S/pressure/velocity
/A1 Based on relaxation to climatology
/A1 But with addition of velocity relaxation
Æ Interpolate to target domain off-line
/A3 Source domain to target domain archive ﬁles
/A3 Nested model does not “know” about
enclosing domain
/A3 Can discard deep iso-pycnal layers
/A3 Can remap to new vertical coordinate
Æ Get boundary data from input archive ﬁles
/A3 Simpliﬁes scalability
/A3 At the cost of more I/O and bigger ﬁles
/AF Same resolution nesting unexpectedly useful
Æ No need to rerun large domain
Æ Change atmospheric forcing (e.g. use MM5)
Æ Change vertical structure
Æ Tracer studies (e.g. add biology)
HYCOM 2.1.03 (IV)
/AF More general ﬁxed (sigma/Z) vertical coordinate
Æ Emulate Z or Sigma or Sigma-Z models
Æ HYCOM has partial cells
/A3 Emulate full cell Z models with the
appropriate bathymetry
/AF Alternative mixed-layer models
Æ Mellor-Y amada 2.5
Æ Price-Weller-Pinkel
/AF Explicit support for 1-D and 2-D domains
Æ Tiling allows periodic domains
Æ 1-D is 2x2 doubly periodic domain
/A3 Only read/write .b ﬁles
Æ 2-D is Nx2 periodic domain
/A3 Inﬁnite f-plane

catalog_entry.summary: This document outlines the development, validation, and documentation of HYCOM version 2.1.03, focusing on new features such as scalability improvements, multi-tracer support, off-line nesting capabilities, and enhanced vertical coordinate options.

provider.name: Alan J. Wallcraft, Naval Research Laboratory
